assets/biome_map.png.role: Authoritative province-aligned biome class colour source
assets/biome_map.png.origin: Generated by tools/terrain/build_biome_map.py from the reviewed biome manifest
assets/biome_map.png.source_reference: WWF-derived Global Biomes ArcGIS feature layer recorded in the bake script and manifest
assets/biome_map.png.review_note: Record the exact upstream dataset licence and redistribution terms before release.

assets/color_lookup_map.png.role: Generated province colour to compact province-ID lookup
assets/color_lookup_map.png.origin: Generated from assets/provinces.bmp and definition data
assets/color_lookup_map.png.review_note: Reproducible, but commercial rights depend on the original province map.

assets/color_map.png.source_reference: Project country and historical ownership data
assets/color_map.png.review_note: Confirm provenance of imported historical country data before release.

assets/colormap_water.png.role: Ocean colour and bathymetric-looking presentation texture
assets/colormap_water.png.source_reference: No source or licence record found in the repository
assets/colormap_water.png.review_note: Must be sourced, licensed, or replaced with an internally generated water asset.

assets/definition.csv.role: Province colour and stable province definition source
assets/definition.csv.source_reference: No source or licence record found in the repository
assets/definition.csv.review_note: Critical dependency of province identity and every derived map bake.

assets/heightmap.png.role: Generated terrain elevation and displacement texture
assets/heightmap.png.source_reference: NASA Earth Observatory / GEBCO source URL recorded in the script
assets/heightmap.png.review_note: Archive exact source version, terms, download hash, and attribution decision.

assets/label_territory_map.png.role: Generated conservative province-ID raster for label fitting
assets/label_territory_map.png.review_note: Output is deterministic; original province-map rights remain unresolved.

assets/lake_mask.png.role: Generated categorical inland-lake mask for water and shoreline presentation
assets/lake_mask.png.origin: Generated by tools/map_visual_audit/build_lake_mask.py from canonical water province IDs and names
assets/lake_mask.png.source_reference: Inherits province graph and province-map provenance; exact source hashes are stored in assets/lake_mask_metadata.json
assets/lake_mask.png.review_note: Treat as lossless nearest-sampled data. It does not resolve the missing approved river source.

assets/lake_mask_metadata.json.role: Deterministic lake-mask provenance, source hashes, IDs, names, and pixel counts
assets/lake_mask_metadata.json.source_reference: Canonical province graph, lookup map, and terrain classification
assets/lake_mask_metadata.json.review_note: Regenerate and validate whenever province topology or water classification changes.

assets/mask_political_map.png.origin: Generated from province and political data
assets/mask_political_map.png.review_note: Generated output must stay synchronized with its source hashes.

assets/noise.tres.role: Procedural noise configuration used by the final map material

assets/provinces.bmp.role: Authoritative province-colour topology and land/water source
assets/provinces.bmp.source_reference: No source or licence record found in the repository
assets/provinces.bmp.review_note: Release blocker until ownership or a replacement path is documented.

assets/terrain_base_map.png.role: Generated macro terrain colour presentation texture
assets/terrain_base_map.png.source_reference: Inherits biome and height source provenance
assets/terrain_base_map.png.review_note: Reproducible after biome and height sources are approved.

assets/terrain_class_map.png.origin: Generated from province ownership and terrain exclusions
assets/terrain_class_map.png.review_note: Treat as lossless data rather than colour artwork.

assets/fonts/LibreBaskerville-Variable.t.origin: Unmodified Libre Baskerville variable font from Google Fonts

assets/marker_art/source_flags/source_ma.role: Per-country historical placeholder source, licence, evidence, attribution, and checksum registry
assets/marker_art/source_flags/source_ma.origin: Generated by tools/marker_art/build_marker_assets.py --fetch-sources from reviewed Wikimedia Commons source-page records
assets/marker_art/source_flags/source_ma.source_reference: tools/marker_art/historical_flag_sources.json and the recorded Commons page/original URLs
assets/marker_art/source_flags/source_ma.review_note: Evidence classifications distinguish contemporary, near-period, and traditional material; do not market every entry as an exact 1444 national flag. Unsourced countries remain transparent.

assets/marker_art/generated/country_shie.role: Runtime country shield atlas covering every canonical country tag
assets/marker_art/generated/country_shie.origin: Deterministically generated by tools/marker_art/build_marker_assets.py from reviewed open sources; unsourced slots are transparent
assets/marker_art/generated/country_shie.review_note: Redistribute with assets/marker_art/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md; consult the historical shield research register before filling transparent slots.

assets/marker_art/generated/marker_icon_.role: Runtime army, navy, battle, siege, settlement, clustering, destination, and invalid-action marker icons
assets/marker_art/generated/marker_icon_.origin: Project-original deterministic painted placeholder artwork generated by tools/marker_art/build_marker_assets.py
assets/marker_art/generated/marker_icon_.source_reference: Internal marker art specification and generator
assets/marker_art/generated/marker_icon_.review_note: EU4-inspired readability target only; no Paradox bitmap or vector artwork is included.

assets/marker_art/generated/marker_asset.role: Stable atlas-slot mapping, dimensions, source status, and replacement metadata
assets/marker_art/generated/marker_asset.source_reference: Canonical country registry and historical flag source manifest
assets/marker_art/generated/marker_asset.review_note: Regenerate whenever registry tags, source assignments, atlas dimensions, or marker icons change.

assets/marker_art/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.role: Redistribution notices and attribution for vendored historical placeholder sources
assets/marker_art/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.origin: Generated from the historical flag source manifest
assets/marker_art/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.review_note: Ship this file with builds that redistribute the sourced flag thumbnails or their atlas derivatives.
